programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: My Friend The Elephant
programme.desc: When four elephants save Raju's life and help him make money, they become his best friends ever. But as he starts having his own private life, things get complicated, and now he must choose between his animal friends and his family. Rajesh Khanna, Tanuja Samarth, David Abraham, Sujit Kumar, Abhi Bhattacharya, M.A. Thirumugham, Javed Akhtar.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Love By Force
programme.desc: Naitik and Akshara are forced to marry, while love brings Kartik and Naira together, revealing the difference between love-based relationships and forced marriage. Hina Khan, Karan Mehra.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Namaste England
programme.desc: Consumed by the dream of immigrating to London, an Indian couple does whatever it takes to make it happen. Parineeti Chopra, Arjun Kapoor, Alankrita Sahai, Satish Kaushik, Atul Sharma, Vipul Amrutlal Shah, Suresh Nair, Ritesh Shah.

programme.title: Chhalaang
programme.desc: A sports teacher at a school in Northern India, Montu sticks to a steady routine, until a new colleague arrives, challenging his teaching skills and threatening both his position and his chance with the girl he admires. Rajkummar Rao, Nushrratt Bharuccha.

programme.title: Baaghi 2
programme.desc: A clueless mother calls her ex-lover, who serves in the Indian army, to help her find her kidnapped daughter. Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Tiger Shroff, Manoj Bajpayee, Randeep Hooda, Ahmed Khan, Sajid Nadiadwala.

programme.title: Bade Miyan Chote Miyan
programme.desc: Arjun and Pyare Mohan are brothers and collogues in the same police station, they don't get along easily, but they are obliged to cooperate, to stop 2 thieves looking like them, who commit crimes efficiently Amitabh Bachchan, Govinda.

programme.title: Happy Phirr Bhag Jayegi
programme.desc: Happy, a modest married woman is caught in the crosshair by a crazy gang after they mistake her for Happy, the lecturer as they reach Shanghai at the same time. Sonakshi Sinha, Diana Penty, Jimmy Sheirgill, Ali Fazal, Piyush Mishra, Mudassar Aziz, Mudassar Aziz.

programme.title: Happy Phirr Bhag Jayegi
programme.desc: Happy, a modest married woman is caught in the crosshair by a crazy gang after they mistake her for Happy, the lecturer as they reach Shanghai at the same time. Sonakshi Sinha, Diana Penty, Jimmy Sheirgill, Ali Fazal, Piyush Mishra, Mudassar Aziz, Mudassar Aziz.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: My Captive
programme.desc: A beautiful yet complicated love blossoms between a spontaneous young man and a girl of strong values and pure intentions. As emotions intensify, their relationship becomes entangled in betrayal, desire, and heartbreak. Hania Aamir, Bilal Abbas Khan.

programme.title: Melodies Of The Heart
programme.desc: A determined mother refuses to bow to the rigid expectations and barriers imposed by society, choosing instead to carve out a path where her daughter's dreams can take flight. Parth Samthaan, Rishita Kothari.

programme.title: Toilet: Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: A woman threatens to leave her husband unless he installs a toilet in their home. To win back her love and respect, he heads out on a journey to fight against the backward society. Akshay Kumar, Bhumi Pednekar, Sudhir Pandey, Anupam Kher, Manoj Bakshi, Shree Narayan Singh, Siddharth Singh, Divyendu Sharma.

programme.title: Marjaavaan
programme.desc: Raghu is believed to be Narayan Anna's second-in-command in the world of crime, which provokes the jealousy of Vishnu, Anna's son. Therefore, he does not hesitate to harm Raghu when he gets the chance. Riteish Deshmukh, Sidharth Malhotra, Tara Sutaria, Rakul Preet Singh, Sanjay Bhatia, Milap Zaveri, Milap Zaveri.
